headers.value: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=(), usb=(), magnetometer=(), gyroscope=(), accelerometer=(), autoplay=(self), fullscreen=(self), picture-in-picture=()

headers._comment:
CSP allowlist details — entries beyond 'self':
  fonts.googleapis.com / fonts.gstatic.com — Google Fonts (Cormorant, Inter, Bebas, Barlow)
  maps.gstatic.com / maps.googleapis.com — Google Maps embed images on city pages
  google.com / maps.google.com — Google Maps iframe on city pages
  assets.calendly.com / *.calendly.com — Calendly booking widget (Tier 1.3). If src/data/business.ts CALENDLY_URL stays null permanently, these can be removed.
  app.cal.com / embed.cal.com — Cal.com booking widget (Tier 1.3). Same conditional removal as above.
headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://assets.calendly.com https://app.cal.com https://embed.cal.com; script-src-attr 'none'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://assets.calendly.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://assets.calendly.com; img-src 'self' data: https://maps.gstatic.com https://maps.googleapis.com https://*.calendly.com https://*.cal.com; media-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://api.web3forms.com https://calendly.com https://*.calendly.com https://app.cal.com https://embed.cal.com; frame-src https://www.google.com https://maps.google.com https://calendly.com https://*.calendly.com https://app.cal.com https://embed.cal.com; worker-src 'self'; manifest-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self' mailto: https://api.web3forms.com; object-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests; report-uri /api/csp-report; report-to csp-endpoint
